definitionOfDone: Support drop and connect on canvas
Record verify report with acceptance coverage

drops.title: Canonical Core Foundation Asset
drops.summary: Single source of truth for product identity and reasoning constraints. This bundle replaces multiple fragmented principle assets.
drops.purpose: Single source of truth for product identity and reasoning constraints. This bundle replaces multiple fragmented principle assets.
drops.content: Single source of truth for product identity and reasoning constraints. This bundle replaces multiple fragmented principle assets.

drops.title: Canonical Legacy Archive Boundary Asset
drops.summary: Single source of truth that `legacy` assets are archive-only and must not participate in active runtime execution.
drops.purpose: Single source of truth that `legacy` assets are archive-only and must not participate in active runtime execution.
drops.content: Single source of truth that `legacy` assets are archive-only and must not participate in active runtime execution.

drops.title: Canonical Acceptance Contract Asset
drops.summary: Single source of truth for artifact acceptance conditions. This asset defines what "done" means and what must be verified before release.
drops.purpose: Single source of truth for artifact acceptance conditions. This asset defines what "done" means and what must be verified before release.
drops.content: Single source of truth for artifact acceptance conditions. This asset defines what "done" means and what must be verified before release.

drops.title: Canonical Execution Protocol Asset
drops.summary: Single source of truth for how chat signals become executable asset graph state.
drops.purpose: Single source of truth for how chat signals become executable asset graph state.
drops.content: Single source of truth for how chat signals become executable asset graph state.

drops.title: Canonical Data Format Contract Asset
drops.summary: Single source of truth for the standard phonowell data model and persistence format. This asset defines how active assets, runtime state, generation diffs, and verification evidence must be represented.
drops.purpose: Single source of truth for the standard phonowell data model and persistence format. This asset defines how active assets, runtime state, generation diffs, and verification evidence must be represented.
drops.content: Single source of truth for the standard phonowell data model and persistence format. This asset defines how active assets, runtime state, generation diffs, and verification evidence must be represented.

drops.title: Canonical State Versioning Contract Asset
drops.summary: Single source of truth for versioning and migration of phonowell persisted state.
drops.purpose: Single source of truth for versioning and migration of phonowell persisted state.
drops.content: Single source of truth for versioning and migration of phonowell persisted state.

drops.title: Canonical Entity Schema Contract Asset
drops.summary: Single source of truth for explicit schemas of phonowell entities instead of validating only the top-level container.
drops.purpose: Single source of truth for explicit schemas of phonowell entities instead of validating only the top-level container.
drops.content: Single source of truth for explicit schemas of phonowell entities instead of validating only the top-level container.

drops.title: Canonical Relation Semantics Contract Asset
drops.summary: Single source of truth for a tighter and more explicit relation vocabulary inside the phonowell asset graph.
drops.purpose: Single source of truth for a tighter and more explicit relation vocabulary inside the phonowell asset graph.
drops.content: Single source of truth for a tighter and more explicit relation vocabulary inside the phonowell asset graph.

drops.title: Canonical Workdir Contract Asset
drops.summary: Single source of truth that the default phonowell project work directory is `.phonowell`.
drops.purpose: Single source of truth that the default phonowell project work directory is `.phonowell`.
drops.content: Single source of truth that the default phonowell project work directory is `.phonowell`.

drops.title: Canonical Project Layer Asset
drops.summary: Single source of truth for introducing a `project` layer above wells so users can manage multiple phonowell projects.
drops.purpose: Single source of truth for introducing a `project` layer above wells so users can manage multiple phonowell projects.
drops.content: Single source of truth for introducing a `project` layer above wells so users can manage multiple phonowell projects.

drops.title: Canonical Generator Diff Contract Asset
drops.summary: Single source of truth that generation must consume asset-management diffs so the generator updates existing artifacts incrementally instead of fully regenerating every time.
drops.purpose: Single source of truth that generation must consume asset-management diffs so the generator updates existing artifacts incrementally instead of fully regenerating every time.
drops.content: Single source of truth that generation must consume asset-management diffs so the generator updates existing artifacts incrementally instead of fully regenerating every time.

drops.title: Canonical Asset Layering Contract Asset
drops.summary: Single source of truth that active assets must distinguish hard contracts from default policy and reference guidance.
drops.purpose: Single source of truth that active assets must distinguish hard contracts from default policy and reference guidance.
drops.content: Single source of truth that active assets must distinguish hard contracts from default policy and reference guidance.

drops.title: Canonical V1 Delivery Asset
drops.summary: Single source of truth for V1 scope, UX, event semantics, runtime contract, and milestone.
drops.purpose: Single source of truth for V1 scope, UX, event semantics, runtime contract, and milestone.
drops.content: Single source of truth for V1 scope, UX, event semantics, runtime contract, and milestone.

drops.title: Canonical UI Observability Contract Asset
drops.summary: Single source of truth that the WebUI must expose the key phonowell control signals instead of hiding them behind implementation internals.
drops.purpose: Single source of truth that the WebUI must expose the key phonowell control signals instead of hiding them behind implementation internals.
drops.content: Single source of truth that the WebUI must expose the key phonowell control signals instead of hiding them behind implementation internals.

drops.title: Mimikit Reference Asset
drops.summary: Reference source for proven orchestration and OpenAI/LLM interaction patterns that can be reused in `phonowell` with minimal adaptation cost.
drops.purpose: Reference source for proven orchestration and OpenAI/LLM interaction patterns that can be reused in `phonowell` with minimal adaptation cost.
drops.content: Reference source for proven orchestration and OpenAI/LLM interaction patterns that can be reused in `phonowell` with minimal adaptation cost.

drops.title: React 19 Reference Asset
drops.summary: Reference baseline for implementing the WebUI graph interaction layer with stable, mature React capabilities and minimal custom uncertainty.
drops.purpose: Reference baseline for implementing the WebUI graph interaction layer with stable, mature React capabilities and minimal custom uncertainty.
drops.content: Reference baseline for implementing the WebUI graph interaction layer with stable, mature React capabilities and minimal custom uncertainty.

drops.title: Codex Reference Asset
drops.summary: Reference tool pattern for fast implementation and verification loops while keeping `phonowell` core model vendor-neutral.
drops.purpose: Reference tool pattern for fast implementation and verification loops while keeping `phonowell` core model vendor-neutral.
drops.content: Reference tool pattern for fast implementation and verification loops while keeping `phonowell` core model vendor-neutral.

drops.title: Visualization-First Reference Asset
drops.summary: Reference principle to prioritize visual expression over verbose text for understanding project structure and decisions.
drops.purpose: Reference principle to prioritize visual expression over verbose text for understanding project structure and decisions.
drops.content: Reference principle to prioritize visual expression over verbose text for understanding project structure and decisions.

drops.title: Engineering Execution Reference Asset
drops.summary: Unified engineering execution reference to keep delivery deterministic, low-friction, and non-blocking for users.
drops.purpose: Unified engineering execution reference to keep delivery deterministic, low-friction, and non-blocking for users.
drops.content: Unified engineering execution reference to keep delivery deterministic, low-friction, and non-blocking for users.
